name: aryanbhasin--tiktok-slideshow
description: Creates TikTok image carousels (slideshows with text overlays on photos) via the ViralBaby API. Use when the user wants to: create TikTok slideshows or carousels, find/search for background images for social media content, post or upload slideshow content to TikTok, edit slide text, or manage image collections for content creation. Do NOT use for: general TikTok account management, TikTok analytics or metrics, video editing or video creation (this is for photo slideshows only), non-TikTok social media platforms, or any task unrelated to creating visual slideshow content for TikTok.
